note: Mage kit (§7). Shape cards; element via attunement re-skin + imbue. Overload = X-cost spend-all. Channel = ops that fire next turn (trigger turnStart, duration thisTurn). Conjure (card-gen) isn't engine-supported, approximated as draw/energy. Tweak later.

cards.name: Zap
cards.artPrompt: "Zap": a robed arcane mage unleashing a single brutal, focused offensive strike, rendered with shimmering violet arcane energy, glowing runes and geometric sigils.

cards.name: Ward
cards.artPrompt: "Ward": a robed arcane mage bracing behind a glowing wall of protective guard, rendered with shimmering violet arcane energy, glowing runes and geometric sigils.
